About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in AXTI, which dominates the rankings with a score of 98.2 and a staggering 1-year return of 9,887.94%—vastly outpacing SPY's performance by 9,860 basis points. AXTI demonstrates textbook momentum characteristics: it passes all four SMA gates, maintains 4 out of 5 consistent return ratios, and shows remarkable resilience with a bad_spy_score of 5.21 (near-perfect insulation from market downturns). In stark contrast, PBT ranks second with a more modest 1-year return of 180.38% and a composite score in the 80s range, showing healthy but far less explosive momentum across all timeframes. Both leaders clear all moving average thresholds and exhibit positive outperformance versus broad indices, but AXTI's returns appear to reflect either a micro-cap recovery, speculative surge, or highly volatile underlying dynamics that warrant scrutiny beyond the momentum metrics alone. The data suggests the dashboard has successfully identified two strong uptrend candidates, though AXTI's extreme magnitude warrants caution regarding liquidity, sustainability, and concentration risk.
